CustomField.description: Indicates whether the Contact currently holds an active health insurance policy. This field is automatically updated by Flow based on related Insurance__c records where Status__c = 'Active'. Used for reporting, eligibility validation, and automated communication processes. Do not update manually.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This value is set automatically when the Contact has at least one active health insurance record. You don’t need to edit this field — it will update when the insurance status changes.
CustomField.label: Holding Active Health Insurance?
